description: Very positive experience overall. If Tali doesn't significantly change I will likely be using it for many years
author: Alton N.
pros: The medical transcription is highly accurate. The ease of copy pasting transcribed notes is very useful
cons: Little hard to get the initial payment processed which delayed implementation. However customer service was very helpful and responsive
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: So far it is all good. I am excited to see how the AI "learns" my style of interviewing and the words I use. I have convinced multiple colleagues to give this software a try and so far I am seeing lots of Thumbs Up!
author: Stacy D.
pros: Tali is super easy to use and its availability as both a desktop and cell phone app make it really flexible in my work day. I use my phone to record patient encounters and enter the generated note from my desktop to the patient EMR. I cannot believe how easy this is!
cons: The one issue is that some of the functionality is turned off if Tali does not "detect" a microphone on the computer. My desktop does not have a microphone so I cannot reuse the transcription to generate a referral or patient note. I have to open my laptop and then the EMR on my laptop to access these features.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: A positive step forward for sure but not sure that I will stay with it given the monthly cost and alternatives on the market.
author: Scott M.
pros: Ease of functionality. The Chrome extension is great.
cons: Repetition and poor organization of the SOAP note takes a fair bit of time to edit sometimes. Voice dictation is quite weak and requires a lot of editing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Tali AI is a game changer
description: Awesome AI for. I will say its a game changer for consultation with ease
author: Omon I.
pros: Helps me to focus more on the patient during consultation, since I know my noted are being scribed. Also well detailed notes in a minute once I complete the consultation.
cons: Sometimes it picks up wrong words, and I have to correct some words
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Very impressed - even if I valued my time at only $10/hour, Tali would easily cover it's monthly cost in the time that it has saved
author: James C.
pros: The ambient scribe will save me a ton of time, but it also allows me to be a better physician. The ambient scribe supports conversation instead of a directed medical interrogation, eye contact instead of splitting eye contact between the patient and the computer.
cons: I wish you had more pre-built templates as well as the customization feature. I may build my own template, but if you had a bunch already made, I am sure that I would just get used to using them.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: May quench the burnout and keep me working
description: I keep waiting for something to NOT greatly exceed my expectations and I haven't found it yet. It has lightened the documentation burden greatly.
author: adam S.
pros: I hate tutorials, videos, detailed installation. I take direction poorly! From Tali home page I pressed the downloaded chrome plug in button and was up and running in 20 seconds. It is so intuitive that no instruction needed- astounding for a non-techie such as myself.
cons: The need to cut and paste from plug-in to an encounter I thought was going to be a problem, and the 30 sec to 4 minutes it takes to generate the note. The 3 iterations that I have running on different work stations all share history so can do the paste on any workstation. single click copy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I'm thoroughly impressed with the overall functionality of this application. It is time saving and well worth the investment. My clinical practice has improved dramatically as I can now focus on what the patient is telling me as opposed to looking at my computer screen.
author: Antoine G.
pros: The ease of use, installation and the support is exceptional
cons: Certain words and medications do not transcribe well.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Tali has completely revolutionized my day-to-day clinical workflow. And confident it will only improve with time as new updates are incorporated to the current technology. The customer support has also been outstanding. I recommend using Tali.ai in the highest possible terms.
author: Kirk H.
pros: Tali's natural language processing technology has solved the most important administrative responsibility for physicians. The need to accurately document a patient encounter. This allows the physician to focus completely on the patient and frees up administrative time to be used for other clinical purposes.
cons: For longer patient encounters it does not capture all the salient points with the same accuracy as shorter clinical encounters.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use, but more customization would help
description: Excellent so far. Need customization. Nice to have whole note of encounter.
author: Harold K.
pros: Ease of use and multiple platforms. Copy and paste is good.
cons: Can’t customize SOAP note to specialist format. Would be good to have sections like History, medical history, medications, family history etc. Would commit to full fee if could customize.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I am extremely happy so far and have been spreading my positive experience with all my colleagues. I think it not only relieves administrative burdens for physicians but also improves patient care and patient satisfaction.
author: Elizabeth B.
pros: Ambient scribe function allows me to talk to my patient instead to trying to capture what they are telling me.
cons: There is nothing not to like about Tali, it is easy to use. The only part that I would like to see moving forward is better EMR integration, for example automatically compiling a consult or lab or X-ray request if it mentioned during the consult.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Speeds up the worst part of practice
description: I do enjoy the ease of use and how it is not intrusive to practice with this application at the side of the screen.
author: Abraham J.
pros: Really enjoy the ease of use which allows me to have more natural conversations with patients rather than being separated by a keyboard. The Ambient Scribe mode has been fantastic to cut through the conversational parts of an encounter while distilling out the important points for record keeping.
cons: I do often find that I have to adjust SOAP notes as there are many instances where subjective reports from the patient are input in the objective findings section, but that is an easy fix - still much better than typing out the entire note.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Positive and simple. I have used and will continue with Tali after very valuable free trial period - 2 weeks - just the right amount of trial time required.
author: Ralph T.
pros: Generative AI works well. Ease of use and functionality great. Good support and easy to access within EMR
cons: Hopefully as uptake increases fees will reduce
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Katie K.
pros: Voice Recognition is pretty good, synopsis, and is very good, allows for a better patient care.
cons: MSK exam could use some work. Definitely insufficient here.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Decent technology that is outrageously expensive
author: Fady S.
pros: Ease if use and accuracy. Saving time on charting
cons: Price is too steep. Not sure if will be able to justify subscription in the future
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: so far it has been an excellent experience
author: Senthil D.
pros: Ambien scribing removes the mental effort which his needed to recollect and accurately dictate a clinical encounter. It saves not just time but frees up mental space for other useful things to be done.
cons: although the SOAP soap format his helpful, other customization can be helpful in my specialty
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Excellent. Does a better job than me at capturing the details, while at the same time changes extensive information into a more concise format.
author: Leanne N.
pros: I love the ability to transform discussions into appropriate notes with minimal corrections. Can create a consult from the historical conversation or soap note. Allows me to focus on the patient and the conversation.
cons: I am yet to navigate how to correct the “errors” in dictation in a timely fashion. But there may be features I still need to learn given I have just finished a trial.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: The overall experience is good. Soap note feature is extremely helpful with the added sentences. It obviously needs a lot of improvements.
author: Majid F.
pros: The soap feature and the accuracy of voice recognition
cons: The pricing.The monthly subscription fees is unreasonably high Compared to the practicality i get from this software.With such pricing, i will switch to another competition once introduced
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Excellent, this is a product I plan to continue to use.
author: Karl A.
pros: Saves hours on charting every day Ease of use Concise notes
cons: Battery use, occasional explaining to patients.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Temitope A.
pros: Very ingenious and self-intuitive; the best thing since sliced bread!
cons: I cant think of any cons at the moment and I am loving this product!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Steven G.
pros: Fidelity of Voice to Speech. Accuracy of Filtering out extraneous integration
cons: SOAP - Multiple issues formatting needs improvement.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Maryse M.
pros: Focusing with the patient more not worrying about charting
cons: Occasional downtime and one realizes that after the encounter and did not chart anything
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
